$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the `tfidf_vocabulary` repo's
`upsertByProfileId` method (Phase-2), in the MINTED-VALUES (remap) form. One
committed file drives BOTH sides of the differential:
- the v4 oracle (build-tfidf-vocabulary-upsert-fixture.ts + the
tfidf-vocabulary-upsert-tier2.ts case), and
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness tfidf_vocabulary_upsert tier-2 test).
WHAT THIS BANKS: v4's `upsertByProfileId(profileId, data)` — find existing by
profileId (findByProfileId); if found -> this.update(existing.id, FULL data);
else -> this.create(data). Both the UPDATE and CREATE branches are exercised,
and a CREATE-then-UPDATE of a MINTED-id row (op 2 creates profileId P3, op 3
upserts P3 -> update of the row whose id v4/Rust minted), which is exactly why
the id remap exists.
MINTED VALUES: the upsert ops pin NOTHING — the CREATE branch mints id +
createdAt + updatedAt; the UPDATE branch mints updatedAt and preserves
createdAt. So the tier-2 harness uses the REMAP normalization (first-seen id
remap in profileId order + createdAt/updatedAt placeholdered). The
createdAt == updatedAt invariant is NOT asserted (an update leaves createdAt
older than the freshly minted updatedAt).
MARSHALING coverage: includeBigrams set both true and false; avgDocLength /
vocabularySize set as both integer-valued (-> JSON integer dump via
js_number_to_json) and fractional (avgDocLength -> float dump), exercising the
REAL-affinity path / integer-collapse. vocabulary/idf are plain-string columns
holding JSON text (z.string(), stored single-encoded, never re-stringified).
SEED rows pin id + createdAt (so the starting state is deterministic); the
seed's updatedAt is minted by v4's overriding create and is irrelevant (the
upsert ops overwrite / placeholder it). Seed rows have distinct profileIds.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key (the folders / tags /
tfidf-vocabulary fixtures use the same one). It is NOT the real Friday pepper
and is safe to commit.

ops.comment: Op 1: upsert matching seed row 1's profileId (P1) -> UPDATE. Full data changes: fractional avgDocLength (8.75 -> float), integer vocabularySize, includeBigrams flips true->false, new vocabulary/idf text. createdAt preserved (2026-01-01); updatedAt minted (placeholdered).
Op 2: upsert a NEW profileId (P3) -> CREATE. id + createdAt + updatedAt all minted. Integer-valued avgDocLength (15 -> JSON integer dump), includeBigrams true.

Op 3: upsert matching the profileId created in op 2 (P3) -> UPDATE of a MINTED-id row (the remap case). Fractional avgDocLength (3.5 -> float), includeBigrams flips true->false, new payload. createdAt preserved (the op-2 mint); updatedAt re-minted (placeholdered).
Op 4: fresh upsert of NEW profileId (P4) -> CREATE. id + createdAt + updatedAt minted. Integer avgDocLength (12 -> JSON integer dump), includeBigrams true.
